items.displayName: Read data from the first sheet of InputTransactionData.xlsx into a DataTable

items.annotation:
Clean spaces for the variables FirstName, LastName, CityName, and StreetName.
Rules:
- Remove leading and trailing spaces.
- Ensure there is at most one space between words.
Keep activity titles short.

items.displayName: Remove leading/trailing spaces and reduce multiple internal spaces for the FirstName variable.
Remove leading/trailing spaces and reduce multiple internal spaces for the LastName variable.
Remove leading/trailing spaces and reduce multiple internal spaces for the CityName variable.
Remove leading/trailing spaces and reduce multiple internal spaces for the StreetName variable.

items.displayName: Construct the string "City raw: [" + CityName + "] | Street raw: [" + StreetName + "]"

items.annotation:
Add two Assign activities in the current sequence.
1. Clean CityName
Set CityName = CityName.Replace(".", "").Replace("/", "").Replace("\"", "")
2. Clean StreetName
Set StreetName = StreetName.Replace(".", "").Replace("/", "").Replace("\"", "")
Keep titles short.
Do not create extra sequences.

items.displayName: Assign the cleaned value to CityName
Assign the cleaned value to StreetName
Log alle variabelen naar de console

items.annotation: valadting the process and logigng back to me

Refactor the UiPath workflow so the FlightDate string is parsed only once using DateTime.TryParseExact, eliminating duplicate parsing and If blocks. Log the input and parsed date, and set isFlightDateValid based on whether parsing succeeds and the date is tomorrow or later.

items.displayName: Attempt to parse the FlightDate string into a DateTime object using the format "dd-MM-yyyy" and store the success status in isParsingSuccessful and the parsed date in FlightDateParsed.

items.annotation: if else for pasrign dat being valid

Validate the Age value by attempting to convert it to an integer and checking if it falls within the valid range of 0 to 120.
Set isAgeValid to true if the conversion succeeds and the value is within range; otherwise set it to false.
make that if the if statment the thing is false that it will log this row to a new excell file and will go to the next oen in the currnet for each seqeunce
